brand_dna.category: Women's online fashion brand centered on a curated denim-led wardrobe of dresses, sets, tops, outerwear, and accessories.
brand_dna.core_belief: Style is an edit, not a pile - a well-curated wardrobe of denim and dressing pieces that lets a woman shop the look, not just the item.
proof_points: Denim-forward signature range: The Geneva Denim Set, The Mercer Denim Jacket, The Savannah Oversized Belted Denim Mini Dress, The Hudson Jeans
Secure Checkout with multi-currency support across global markets
brand_dna.positioning: Trend-led, curated 'edit' fashion at accessible-premium price points, organized by shoppable collections rather than endless racks.

voice_pillars.name: Curated Edit
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks in named collections and edits, framing the range as hand-picked selections rather than a sprawling catalog.

voice_pillars.name: Denim-Led
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with denim as the signature category and hero of the assortment.

voice_pillars.name: Named-Piece Polish
voice_pillars.desc: Gives each item a personal, place-name identity for a boutique, elevated feel.
voice_pillars.quote: The Savannah Oversized Belted Denim Mini Dress

voice_pillars.name: Effortless Off-Duty
voice_pillars.desc: Frames pieces around relaxed, everyday dressing and easy wear-anywhere styling.

icp: Style-conscious women who want trend-forward, denim-led outfits made easy through curated edits and matching sets, and who value effortless, put-together looks at an accessible-premium price.

personas.name: Denim Devotee
personas.description: Builds her wardrobe around jeans, jackets, and denim dresses - moved by signature pieces like The Hudson Jeans and The Mercer Denim Jacket framed as wardrobe staples.

personas.name: Effortless Edit Shopper
personas.description: Wants the outfit decided for her - responds to matching sets and shoppable edits like The Geneva Set that deliver a complete off-duty look in one click.

personas.name: Trend-Chasing Restocker
personas.description: Follows the newest drops and 'New' arrivals - moved by fresh, named pieces and the sense of a rotating, curated collection.

products_ladder.title: The Savannah Oversized Belted Denim Mini Dress

allowed.claim: Shop by curated edits including the Denim Edit and The Style Shark Edit

banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim with no verifiable backing on site
FTC Green Guides - specific recycled/carbon claims require verifiable proof not present in the input

banned.claim: Jeans or denim 'relieve back pain' or 'improve posture'
banned.why: Banned medical/orthopedic claim for the apparel category
FTC Green Guides - unqualified environmental/ethical claim with no supporting evidence provided

banned.claim: Guaranteed exact delivery dates or 'ships in X days'
banned.why: No stated fulfillment timeline in the input - would be an unsupported operational claim
